sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ خُلُقٌ عَظِيمٌ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ وَالْجَنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost je plemenita osobina koja vodi ka dobročinstvu i Džennetu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait that leads to righteousness and Paradise.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ، رَقْم ٢٦٠٧].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu i održavanju rodbinskih veza, br. 2607].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Virtue and Good Manners, No. 2607].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الصَّادِقُ يَحْتَرِمُهُ النَّاسُ وَيُحِبُّهُ اللَّهُ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenog muslimana ljudi poštuju, a Allah ga voli.
sentences.translationEn: People respect a truthful Muslim, and Allah loves him.

sentences.arabic: أَمَّا الْكَذِبُ فَهُوَ صِفَةٌ سَيِّئَةٌ تُؤَدِّي إِلَى النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, laž je loša osobina koja vodi u vatru.
sentences.translationEn: As for lying, it is a bad trait that leads to the Fire.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ نَتَعَلَّمُ أَنْ نَقُولَ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا فِي حَيَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Zato učimo da uvijek govorimo istinu u našim životima.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we learn to always speak the truth in our lives.
